response.justification: Despite a long and diverse engineering career, the candidate shows minimal evidence of direct experience with Java/Kotlin, JVM tooling, Spring ecosystem, or IDE internals — key requirements for this role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile apps, with only brief, unelaborated mentions of Java in past roles without context of enterprise tooling or IDE development.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems in distributed environments
concerns: No demonstrable experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise Java tooling
Lack of documented work on IDE internals, language servers, or JVM-based tooling
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) does not align with JVM-focused role
